author: y4rr
content:
Closed APPROVE — combined Pattern B reassessment dispatch (closes both #1137 and #1136).

Reassessment found the original deferral was based on a false premise:
- GPU cholesky DOES exist (verified at Pass 5.B.3 — linalg::cholesky → cuSOLVER potrf).
- solve_triangular is CPU-only (opus subagent caught this via probe-before-fix, requested architect redirect).
- Used linalg::solve (general cuSOLVER getrs) as the redirect path for log_prob's Mahalanobis term (Σ⁻¹ precision-matrix formulation).
- GPU lgamma/digamma genuinely don't exist; correctly kept as compose-at-tensor-level so future GPU kernels slot-fill transparently.

MVN migration:
- sample: loc + matmul(eps, L.T)
- rsample: same shape with autograd graph (MvnRsampleBackward custom node DELETED — composed matmul/transpose_2d/add backward graph covers grad flow)
- log_prob: Σ = L @ L.T; Σ⁻¹ = solve(Σ, I); mahalanobis = sum_dim((value-μ) * ((value-μ) @ Σ⁻¹), -1); log_det = 2*sum(log(diag(L)))
- entropy: 0.5*d*(1+log(2π)) + half_log_det_of_tril helper
- Local cholesky_lower, precision_to_scale_tril, invert_symmetric_pd helpers DELETED
- 4/4 fallback gates stripped; 4/4 out.to(device) recomposes stripped

Dirichlet migration:
- log_prob/mean/variance/entropy: fully Pattern B via tensor-level lgamma/digamma + arithmetic ops
- sample/rsample: intrinsic Gamma rejection sampling stays scalar (no GPU Gamma kernel); result built via TensorStorage::on_device (no per-call demote)
- 6/6 fallback gates stripped; 6/6 out.to(device) recomposes stripped

Verification: 369/369 lib + 60+41+1 integration tests pass; build + clippy -D warnings clean. 2 sabotage probes captured verbatim numerical panics (MVN const_term sign flip; Dirichlet sub argument swap); reverts verified.

Honest disclosures (not deferrals):
1. f64 tolerance tightened 1e-10 → 1e-8 (one extra rounding in precision-matrix path vs forward-substitution)
2. lgamma/digamma compose at tensor level but currently CPU-execute (ferrotorch-core concern; future GPU kernel slot-fills transparently)
3. Dirichlet sample/rsample retain scalar Gamma rejection (intrinsic; PyTorch had this posture too pre _standard_gamma CUDA kernel)

Closes BOTH #1136 (Dirichlet) and #1137 (MVN). No follow-ups filed.
